prompt: Simple centered icon asset, bold silhouette, minimal detail, high contrast, readable at small sizes. Create one icon from a matched two-icon mobile app family. STRICT CAMERA AND GEOMETRY: exact straight-on front view, orthographic projection, zero perspective, zero rotation, zero tilt, no diagonal composition. The icon object's vertical and horizontal edges must be parallel to the image edges. Do not show the top face or side face of the object. Center the object on both axes. The main object occupies exactly about 58 percent of canvas width and 58 percent of canvas height. Place it inside a warm white rounded-square app tile occupying about 88 percent of the canvas, with identical corner radius and identical very pale cool-lilac edge haze. Soft frontal studio lighting with a slight top-left highlight, very subtle ambient occlusion directly underneath, smooth satin material, softly beveled edges. Premium light skeuomorphism, pastel colors, refined and professional education-tool feeling, restrained rather than toy-like. Must remain instantly recognizable at 48px. No text, no letters, no numbers. SUBJECT: final-term student report. A single upright report booklet seen exactly from the front, with softly rounded corners and a subtle pink-to-lilac front cover. On its face, show one small white checklist panel and a tiny golden-pink achievement seal near the lower-right, both aligned upright. The report booklet itself is upright and perfectly centered. Use pastel petal pink, lilac and periwinkle accents. Avoid: tilted, angled, rotated, diagonal, perspective, three-quarter view, isometric, side view, top view, visible side edge, visible top edge, curved open book, skewed shape, text, Chinese characters, English letters, numbers, watermark, logo, multiple icons, full UI screen, dark background, harsh shadow, glossy plastic toy, photorealism, excessive detail, thick outline, neon, orange dominance, clutter, cropped object.
